SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement ("Agreement") is made on this 1st day of October 2023.

PARTIES:

1. Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC No. S2345678D, of 123 Orchard Lane, Singapore 238888. Contact: +65 6123 4567, Email: emily.tan@fictionalcorp.sg.

2. Mr. John Lim, NRIC No. S3456789E, of 456 Raffles Avenue, Singapore 239999. Contact: +65 6234 5678, Email: john.lim@businessentity.sg.

3. TriStar Holdings Pte. Ltd., UEN 200912345B, located at 789 Serangoon Road, Singapore 310000. Contact: +65 6345 6789, Email: corporate@tristarholdings.sg.

WHEREAS, the Shareholders agree to invest the sum of SGD 1,000,000 (One Million Singapore Dollars) into the joint venture entity known as FutureTech Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN T20LL1234L.
